index.description: The INDEX from the input digest line

series_folder.description: Canonical series name as lowercase kebab-case folder

season.description: Anime installment: an INTEGER for ordinary numbered seasons, OR a lowercase kebab-case STRING for named installments (e.g. 'final-stage'); null for manga/book/unknown

scrobble_title.description: Anime only: exact romaji title of the MAL entry this installment scrobbles to, truncated before ':'. Chosen from the live MAL candidates in HINT when present. null when not anime or unsure
